settings.headline: What if breathing well was the easiest part of your day?
settings.supporting_copy: Aira makes one thing properly — a magnetic nasal strip designed to disappear into your routine, and stay there.

settings.heading: A small thing, missed by most.
settings.body:
Aira began with restless nights — partners who couldn't sleep through snoring, mornings that started tired, gyms where breath gave out before the legs did.

The fix was always the same: breathe through the nose. Easy to say. Harder when your nasal passages are working against you.

settings.heading: We engineer for nights, not first impressions.
settings.body:
We didn't set out to sell tape. We set out to fix something almost everyone takes for granted — and almost no one does well.

We don't chase trends. We pay attention to physiology, materials, and the small details that make a product disappear into your routine.

settings.heading: Built to last. Honest about what it is.
settings.body:
A reusable magnetic band, replaceable adhesive tabs — designed for months of use, not landfill cycles.

A strip helps you breathe. It isn't a cure. We won't pretend otherwise, or invent stats to sell harder. Tested in heat, made for the GCC.

settings.headline: One product, done properly. Then the next.
settings.body: We're not building a vitamin aisle. We're building a small, careful collection of things that help you breathe, sleep, and recover — starting with the strip you came here for.

settings.quote: I sleep so much better now
settings.name: Sarah M.

settings.quote: My partner noticed the difference immediately
settings.name: James K.

settings.quote: Finally stopped mouth breathing at night
settings.name: Omar D.
